debug_info.goal:
case cons
a : Type
x : a
inst✝ : Inhabited a
t : Chapter8.S1.Tree a
ts : List (Chapter8.S1.Tree a)
ih :
  Chapter8.S1.spine a
      (@List.foldl (Chapter8.S1.Tree a) (Chapter8.S1.Tree a) (Chapter8.S1.Tree.node a) (Chapter8.S1.Tree.leaf a x) ts) =
    Chapter8.S1.Tree.leaf a x :: ts
⊢ Chapter8.S1.spine a
      (@List.foldl (Chapter8.S1.Tree a) (Chapter8.S1.Tree a) (Chapter8.S1.Tree.node a)
        (Chapter8.S1.Tree.node a (Chapter8.S1.Tree.leaf a x) t) ts) =
    Chapter8.S1.Tree.leaf a x :: t :: ts

proof:
have aux (acc) (qs : List (Tree a)) : spine (List.foldl .node acc qs) = spine acc ++ qs := by
      induction qs generalizing acc <;> simp [*, List.foldl, spine]
    simp [aux, spine]
failed_attempts:
have lem (acc : Tree a) : spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc ts) = spine acc ++ ts := by
      induction ts generalizing acc <;> simp [*, spine, List.foldl]
    simp [lem, spine]

have : ∀ acc, spine (List.foldl .node acc ts) = spine acc ++ ts := by
      induction ts with
      | nil => simp
      | cons _ _ ih => intro; simp [List.foldl, spine, ih]
    simp [this, spine]

have lem (acc) (ts) : spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc ts) = spine acc ++ ts := by
      induction ts generalizing acc <;> simp [*, spine, List.foldl]
    rw [lem]; simp [spine]

have h (acc) : spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc ts) = spine acc ++ ts := by
      induction ts generalizing acc <;> simp [List.foldl, spine, *]
    rw [h]
    simp [spine]

have aux : ∀ acc, spine (ts.foldl .node acc) = spine acc ++ ts := by
      induction ts <;> intro <;> simp [*, spine]
    simp [aux, spine]

suffices ∀ u, spine (List.foldl .node u ts) = spine u ++ ts by simp [this, spine]
    intro u
    induction ts generalizing u <;> simp [spine, *]

suffices ∀ acc, spine (List.foldl .node acc ts) = spine acc ++ ts by simp [this, spine]
    intro acc
    induction ts generalizing acc <;> simp [spine, *]

suffices ∀ acc, spine (ts.foldl .node acc) = spine acc ++ ts by simp [this, spine]
    intro acc
    induction ts generalizing acc <;> simp [*, spine]

generalize Tree.leaf x = acc
  induction ts generalizing acc <;> simp [spine, *]
induction ts generalizing acc <;> simp [*, spine, List.foldl]

have lem (acc) : spine (List.foldl .node acc ts) = spine acc ++ ts := by
      induction ts generalizing acc <;> simp_all [spine]
    simp [lem, spine]

have h (acc) : spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc ts) = spine acc ++ ts := by
      induction ts generalizing acc <;> simp [*, spine]
    rw [h, spine]

have lem : ∀ acc, spine (List.foldl .node acc ts) = spine acc ++ ts := by
      intro acc
      induction ts generalizing acc <;> simp [*, spine, List.foldl]
    simp [lem, spine]
induction ts generalizing acc <;> simp [*, spine]

have gen (acc) : spine (ts.foldl .node acc) = spine acc ++ ts := by
      induction ts generalizing acc with
      | nil => simp
      | cons _ _ ih' => simp [List.foldl]; rw [ih']; simp [spine]
    rw [gen]
    simp [spine]
successful_attempts:
have aux (acc) (qs : List (Tree a)) : spine (List.foldl .node acc qs) = spine acc ++ qs := by
      induction qs generalizing acc <;> simp [*, List.foldl, spine]
    simp [aux, spine]

have aux (acc) (ys : List (Tree a)) : spine (List.foldl .node acc ys) = spine acc ++ ys := by
      induction ys generalizing acc <;> simp [*, spine]
    apply aux

have lem (acc : Tree a) (qs : List (Tree a)) : spine (List.foldl .node acc qs) = spine acc ++ qs := by
      induction qs generalizing acc <;> simp [spine, *]
    rw [lem]
    simp [spine]

have gen (acc : Tree a) (ls : List (Tree a)) :
      spine (ls.foldl .node acc) = spine acc ++ ls := by
      induction ls generalizing acc <;> simp [*, spine]
    rw [gen]
    simp [spine]

have lem (acc : Tree a) (qs : List (Tree a)) : spine (List.foldl .node acc qs) = spine acc ++ qs := by
      induction qs generalizing acc with
      | nil => simp
      | cons q qs ih =>
        simp [List.foldl]
        rw [ih]
        simp [spine]
    rw [lem]
    simp [spine]

have lem (acc : Tree a) (ys : List (Tree a)) :
      spine (List.foldl .node acc ys) = spine acc ++ ys := by
      induction ys generalizing acc <;> simp [List.foldl, spine, *]
    rw [lem]
    simp [spine]

have aux (l : List (Tree a)) (u : Tree a) :
      spine (l.foldl .node u) = spine u ++ l := by
      induction l generalizing u <;> simp [*, spine]
    rw [aux]
    simp [spine]

have aux (acc : Tree a) (l : List (Tree a)) : spine (List.foldl .node acc l) = spine acc ++ l := by
      induction l generalizing acc <;> simp [*, spine]
    simp [aux, spine]

have aux (l : List (Tree a)) (acc : Tree a) :
      spine (List.foldl .node acc l) = spine acc ++ l := by
      induction l generalizing acc with
      | nil => simp
      | cons t ts ih => simp [List.foldl, spine, ih]
    rw [aux]
    simp [spine]

have h (u) (l : List (Tree a)) : spine (l.foldl .node u) = spine u ++ l := by
      induction l generalizing u <;> simp [*, spine]
    simp [h, spine]

have aux : ∀ acc (qs : List (Tree a)), spine (List.foldl .node acc qs) = spine acc ++ qs := by
      intro acc qs
      induction qs generalizing acc <;> simp [List.foldl, spine, *]
    rw [aux]
    simp [spine]

have aux (acc : Tree a) (qs : List (Tree a)) :
      spine (List.foldl .node acc qs) = spine acc ++ qs := by
      induction qs generalizing acc with
      | nil => simp
      | cons q qs ih => simp [List.foldl]; rw [ih]; simp [spine]
    rw [aux]
    simp [spine]

have lem (l : List (Tree a)) (s : Tree a) : spine (l.foldl .node s) = spine s ++ l := by
      induction l generalizing s <;> simp [spine, List.foldl, *]
    rw [lem]
    simp [spine]

have aux (acc) (qs : List (Tree a)) : spine (List.foldl .node acc qs) = spine acc ++ qs := by
      induction qs generalizing acc <;> simp [*, List.foldl, spine]
    rw [aux]
    simp [spine]
